extortion.description: Siwax Group specializes in the design and production of high-quality waxes, emulsions, and hotmelts for various industries. Their extensive product range caters to sectors such as packaging, food, rubber, surface treatments, and cosmetics.We will upload 13gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal documents (passports other personal docs and scans), financials, files with Volkswagen and Renault names and so on, projects, contracts and agreements, NDAs, etc.
